NAVAREA XIX 148/24

 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  290630 UTC NOV 24
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 71-17.62N 020-07.20E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 66-05.50N 008-03.30E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
 65-44.30N 007-39.40E SCARABEO 8
 65-34.10N 007-12.20E TRANSOCEAN NORGE

 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　132/24
